title: draba verna var. fallacina
intro: Draba verna var. fallacina, also known as spring whitlowgrass or false whitlow-grass, is a small flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Draba verna var. fallacina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
